_doc_: CANONICAL package.json for a boring-ui plugin under .pi/extensions/<kebab-name>/.
Strip this _doc_ key when copying. No scripts, no dependencies, no devDependencies — the dev server transforms .tsx on the fly via Vite.
boring.front: relative path to the front factory file.
boring.server: omit (no server) OR a relative path string like 'server/index.ts'. NEVER true.
pi.extensions: optional, path string(s) to in-process Pi extension files like 'agent/index.ts' — different from boring.server (which runs server-side).
name: <kebab-name>

pi.systemPrompt: <Label> plugin — describe what it does so the agent knows when to use it.
